name: Italian Wedding Soup
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup orzo (tiny rice shaped grains of pasta)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ground beef, egg, bread crumbs, Parmesan cheese, onion, salt, and pepper in a bowl. Form into small balls, about 1/2 inch in diameter.
2. Bring 6 cups of water to a slow boil in a stockpot. Add chicken broth and season with onion powder, garlic powder, celery salt, salt, and pepper to taste.
3. Add the meatballs to the pot and cook for a few minutes until they are done. Remove the meatballs using a slotted spoon.
4. Add the orzo to the pot and cook for about 5 minutes.
5. Add the escarole and return the meatballs to the soup pot. Heat through and serve. Top with Parmesan cheese.
This soup is great anytime of the year.
Serves: 10
Prep. time: 15 minutes
Cooking time: 60 minutes
